joke: Why did the donut go to the dentist? Because it needed a filling!
Monday walked into the office. The manager said, "You're late!" Monday said, "I had to stop and get a paperclip."

Why did the refrigerator go to therapy?  
It couldn't stop chilling!
I tried to tell a joke about animals, but I forgot what animals are. Wait, do cats count?
Why did the vacuum cleaner go to the therapist? Because it had too many issues! ...Wait, is that appliance? Damn.

Why did the rainbow go to therapy?  
It couldn't stop projecting itself onto others!

Why did existential dread go to therapy?  
It couldn't stop existing!

Okay, clear the decks. No food, no work, no appliances, no animals, no weather, no anxiety... Got it. Here's one that's about... *checks list*... nothing at all.  

Why did the comedian keep telling jokes to a brick wall?  
...He thought it was great at keeping things together!

Why don't I tell you a joke about... *checks imaginary rulebook again*... the concept of telling jokes about something that isn't on your list?  

Get this: I tried telling a joke about a topic that's "completely different," but the topic *was* "telling a joke about something different." Now my head hurts. And I think we're both trapped in a bit.

This is tough. Everything's forbidden. Fine. Here's a joke about... *long pause*... the color beige.  

Why did beige go to the party?  
...It heard the theme was "neutral territory"!  
*(Sighs) Wait, is "color" banned now? Damn. Nothing left. Lamest joke ever. But it's beige! You can't get mad at beige! It won't fight back!*

Alright, audience. You win.  
**(Leans in, conspiratorial whisper)**  
My last joke was about "the act of banning topics"... but that’s probably "meta" or "comedy" or... whatever. So here’s one that’s **technically** about... **air**.  

**Why did the mime go broke?**  
Because the only bank that would take a "silent deposit" charged him **heavy fees**.  
*(Pauses)* ...Wait. Is "mime" an "animal"? A "job"? Is "air" a "weather"? **DAMMIT, I

(Stares silently, then slowly raises a hand)  
"Could... could I tell a joke about... nothing?"  

(Beat)  
Why did void go to therapy?  
...It was struggling with emptiness!  

(Shrugs) If that counts as 'something,' I'm switching to mime.  
*(Pantomimes walking into a wall, then collapsing dramatically)*

*(Slaps knee, then freezes mid-laugh)*  
"Okay, fine. Last try. I'm telling a joke about **the sound of one hand clapping**...  
*(Lean in, whispering)*  
...It’s the only topic left that doesn’t exist."  

*(Stares blankly. Slowly turns to exit stage left.)*
